title: senecio morettii
intro: Senecio morettii, also known as Moretti's ragwort, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Senecio morettii include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and promote the removal of mucus from the lungs. Herbal preparations of Senecio morettii can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat various respiratory and digestive issues.
